results.title: Hungarian PM reveals details of meeting with Zelenskyy, says they discussed potential meeting in Berehove
results.description: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar has mentioned his meeting with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy during a press conference after an EU summit.

results.title: Mowing for muscles
results.description: “Vanity of vanities, says the Preacher, vanity of vanities! All is vanity. What does man gain by all the toil at which he toils under the sun? A generation goes, and a generation comes, but the earth remains forever.”

results.title: Ireland deports 42 South Africans on chartered flight
results.description: Forty-two South African nationals who were living in Ireland without legal permission have been deported on a chartered flight as part of an immigration
